notes.en: [[character:lyney]]'s [[ability:skill]] and [[ability:burst]] talent priority **largely depends on how often he uses his [[ability:burst]] and how many Prop Surplus stacks he gains per rotation.**
notes.fr: La priorité du [[ability:skill]] et [[ability:burst]] de [[character:lyney]] **dépends largement de la fréquence à laquelle il utilise son [[ability:burst]] et de combien de cumuls de fantasmagorie il gagne par rotation.**
